title: Wh33zy's Tack Overhaul
body:
> Immersion is in the little things... and in Minecraft, one of those things is the saddle.

This pack adds more immersive saddle models and textures for horses, donkeys, mules, pigs, camels, and striders. Mount chests are also reworked to look more like real travel packs. The saddle item texture has also been refreshed.

Donkeys and mules get immersive saddlebags, plus extra details like a book and a canteen.
Camels come with detailed gear: saddle blankets, for two players decorative sleeping bags, a gourd canteen, and emissive lanterns in three colors - red, yellow, and pink.
Llamas got an update too: simple leather packs for the minimalists, or detailed trader llama gear for the maximalists.

This pack is supported only on **EMF & ETF** mods - it doesn’t work properly on OptiFine and there are no plans to add compatibility.

Contact:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/wh33zy
